hotel_name: FLC Sea Tower Quy Nhon SeaView Condotel

reviews.title: Rating above 9*, I had high hopes, but the result was extremely disappointing.
reviews.text:
I contacted the owner of the room to ask if there were rooms with two beds, and the owner said there were, but when I checked in, I received a room with one bed. After that, I requested a change, and the owner moved me to a room that was quite poor quality. 
+ The bed is much higher and worse than those in other rooms. 
+ The room did not have any cabinets, from bedside tables to TV racks. 
+ The fridge was a mini one-door type, and when I received the room, it was placed outside the window to dry. 
-> The room I received was very bad and lacking in furniture, like a storage room rather than a rental room, so I left that room and booked another one that was much better (you can see the photos for clarity). After that, I contacted the owner again to inform them that I would not be staying, and that same evening, the owner called, and I returned the room key. 
Despite having a bad experience with the room and losing money, the landlord was very enthusiastic, and the room was clean, smelling of lemongrass, with all necessary eating utensils for guests and laundry detergent for washing clothes.

reviews.title: TERRIBLE Elevator waiting time
reviews.text: I will never book a condotel ever again!!! It takes forever to wait for the elevator, especially during this peak season. Plus, people don't get in line, the whole thing is frustrating. The facility is just decent.
reviews.room_type: Seaview Three Bedroom Suite with Bathtub

reviews.title: Clean apartment, good location  nice view
reviews.text: The apartment was ok, spacious, clean with a nice view. The only downside was lacking amenities, no soap,  no shampoo, no washing powder for washing machine. I had to buy it all which was a waste as I couldn’t take it with me the next day. It’s worth pointing out that there is no aircon in any communal areas from reception to lifts. It was 37C and felt hotter even inside, especially the lifts were a torture as it was waiting in reception for check in for half hour. The lifts are slow and waiting time can be over 5 mins. Not advisable if you have young children or older people travelling with you. Overall positive experience.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Great apartment and nothing not to like about. Rooms are very spacious and comfortable with a nice view. My only complaint is the elevator. Often slow and always packed with people

reviews.title: Good 3 bedroom apartment
reviews.text: Good size rooms, hot water was good,  good location and price. Good for kids having the mutiple rooms and lounge area, nice view over the beach from the balcony
reviews.room_type: Seaview Three Bedroom Suite with Bathtub

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: thích hợp đi với gia đình

reviews.title: Condotel right in the city center
reviews.text: There are convenience stores and various types of restaurants around, so you won't have to worry about going hungry in this area. The building has a spacious parking garage that charges by the hour. The apartment-style rooms come with a kitchen, refrigerator, washing machine, laundry detergent, and a drying area. The prices are affordable, but since it's summer, it can be a bit crowded, and sometimes you'll have to wait a while for the elevator, even though there are five of them.

reviews.title: Good Service
reviews.text: - Great service & very reasonable prices. I will definitely support again next time. Thank you for everything.

reviews.title: Nice apartment.
reviews.text: The rooms are beautiful, clean, with a sea view, right in the center, and there are many shops and cafes around. The staff is friendly and enthusiastic. The food in Quy Nhon is both delicious and cheap. The local people are all lovely and warm-hearted. The downside of the apartment is that it is on a very high floor, making the elevator somewhat inconvenient (stopping at many floors), and the bathroom doesn't have a ventilation hole, so it can smell a bit or you must keep the door slightly open frequently. But overall, my family had a wonderful vacation.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Overall, it's not too beautiful, but the view is excellent and the staff is super hospitable. Oh, the room we stayed in is just a 2-minute walk from the beach, which is very convenient for getting around.

reviews.title: The room is very good.
reviews.text: The room is spacious and airy, with a beautiful view of the sea, clean and tidy. The room I booked has 2 beds, very lovely, with all necessary furnishings. The apartment's location is also close to the beach and many famous local restaurants.

reviews.title: Relaxing by the beach.
reviews.text: Chill beach view, super close to the beach and many delicious restaurants, close to the night market and the square, easy to get around, electric shuttle service that takes you right to the place, beautiful room, the pool is decent too.

reviews.title: Satisfaction
reviews.text: I am satisfied with the quality of the accommodation and the service attitude here. The room is very beautiful, with a stunning sea view to watch the sunrise. The room has a soaking tub and a romantic window overlooking the outside.
reviews.response: FLC Sea Tower Seaview xin cảm ơn Quý Khách đã tin tưởng và ủng hộ dịch vụ bên em.

reviews.title: Quality worthy of the price.
reviews.text: The price is not too high, but the quality is beyond expectations. The room is very beautiful and luxurious. I sat on the balcony enjoying the sea view, which was very nice. Anyone who likes sea views should try booking this place.

reviews.title: reasonable prices
reviews.text: Beautiful, clean, airy apartment with a sea view but the price is quite reasonable. At first glance, I wasn't very hopeful about the view based on the price, but I was really lucky to book a place with a very nice view. Anyone who loves beach bathing should book this place; it's only about a 3-minute walk to the beach.
reviews.response: FLC Sea Tower Seaview xin cảm ơn Quý Khách đã tin tưởng và ủng hộ dịch vụ bên em.

reviews.title: Wonderful relaxation
reviews.text: I had a pretty good vacation here. I will continue to support if I have the chance. I booked a one-bedroom unit that was quite spacious and clean, with a beautiful sea view, and the staff were very friendly and nice.
reviews.response: FLC Sea Tower Seaview xin cảm ơn Quý Khách đã tin tưởng và ủng hộ dịch vụ bên em.
reviews.room_type: Seaview Three Bedroom Suite with Bathtub

reviews.title: enthusiastic, handsome staff
reviews.text: The room has no complaints about its beauty and comfort. Especially, the staff is very handsome. If the ladies don’t know where to eat well, just ask the staff; I received very enthusiastic advice and was able to eat at some delicious and very inexpensive places. I will definitely come back.
reviews.response: FLC Sea Tower Seaview xin cảm ơn Quý Khách đã tin tưởng và ủng hộ dịch vụ bên em.

reviews.title: very clean
reviews.text: It's rare to book a satisfactory apartment like this, so I have to share it with everyone today. If you expect this place to be luxurious, it might not be exactly luxury, but it looks beautiful and is very new, with a nice view, and importantly, it has a convenient location for exploring many places in the city. I recommend everyone to give it a try to experience it for themselves.
reviews.response: FLC Sea Tower Seaview xin cảm ơn Quý Khách đã tin tưởng và ủng hộ dịch vụ bên em.

reviews.title: Clean
reviews.text: Neat, clean, and fragrant bedding. In general, I like the apartment to be very tidy; unfortunately, I booked a room that doesn’t have a direct view of the sea, but the side view is still beautiful, so I’ll give it a 9 instead of 10, haha.
reviews.response: FLC Sea Tower Seaview xin cảm ơn Quý Khách đã tin tưởng và ủng hộ dịch vụ bên em.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: It's always beyond expectations. I saw the pictures and they looked normal, but in reality, it was really good. The room was neat, spacious, had a sea view, and smelled great. The blankets smelled divine, I loved it. I will book again if I have a chance to go to Quy Nhon.

reviews.title: Go as a couple.
reviews.text: The room is very beautiful, perfect for taking pictures, and the bathtub is spacious and luxurious. I found it super close to the beach when I walked from the hotel, and there are many quality eateries around. If you want places to hang out, just wander around Nguyen Thi Dinh street and you'll find plenty.

reviews.title: Reasonable prices
reviews.text: When I booked on Agoda, I saw this place was quite reasonably priced, so I decided to give it a try. After going back, I found that everything was exactly as described. The room had a view just like they advised, clean and beautiful. The staff was also very helpful, so I really liked it there. If I get a chance, I will visit again to support.

reviews.title: Quality room
reviews.text: I booked during the sale, what a great deal. The room is beautiful too. I was really pleased when I saw the room upon check-in. It's only about a 5-minute walk to the beach, super convenient. I would definitely book again if I have the chance.

reviews.title: What a View!
reviews.text: Couldn’t have enjoyed my stay more. The view was magnificent, location was great and the apartment was comfortable clean and very cosy.

reviews.title: Soft, comfortable color tone.
reviews.text: The colors in the room are gentle, creating a feeling of relaxation and comfort.

reviews.title: Fully equipped with amazing ocean views.
reviews.text: Excellent location with unbeatable views. The apartment had all the amenities we needed. Loved sipping coffee while looking at the ocean.

reviews.title: Better than the photos – stunning sunset view!
reviews.text: A hidden gem by the sea. The apartment is even better than the photos. Watching the sunset from the balcony was magical.

reviews.title: Perfect view of the sea, fully equipped and very comfortable.
reviews.text: A wonderful stay at a beautiful location. The apartment was cozy, fully equipped, and had a fantastic view of the sea. I would love to come back!

reviews.title: Wonderful stay! Clean and modern apartment with everything necessary. The sound of the waves was relaxing.
reviews.text: A wonderful experience! The apartment was clean, modern, and had everything we needed. Waking up to the sound of the waves was fantastic.

reviews.title: Stylish and comfortable with spectacular beach views. The host was welcoming and helpful.
reviews.text: Couldn’t ask for a better place! The apartment was stylish, comfortable, and had a spectacular view of the beach. The host was very welcoming.

reviews.title: Incredible ocean views! Cozy, well-furnished apartment in a peaceful setting. Highly recommended!
reviews.text: Incredible ocean views and a peaceful atmosphere! The apartment was beautifully furnished, and everything was well taken care of. Highly recommended!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Good place to stay

reviews.title: Doskonała obsługa
reviews.text: Właściciele bardzo mili i pomocni. Wszystko było gotowe na nasz przyjazd, a kontakt był bezproblemowy.

reviews.title: Best seaside hotel apartment, best service!
reviews.text: The best room, spacious, everything is well thought out. The best service, immediate response and satisfaction. The best location, you can see the sea! The best price!

reviews.title: Perfect for families!
reviews.text: The apartment is very spacious, with a beautiful sea view. Kids love to swim right in front of the sea. We can enjoy the sea and the landscape without going far.

reviews.title: I will return
reviews.text: Perfect location and amenities.

reviews.title: Excellent Location
reviews.text: After spending a week here we changed our plans for other cities and stayed another six nights. Beautiful beach and attractions a short distance away.

reviews.title: Great Location!
reviews.text: We planned for two nights and extended another five nights since it was perfect.

reviews.title: Beautiful, clean apartment.
reviews.text: I am on the 18th floor of a spacious apartment, I can cook in the apartment if I want, close to the beach and easy to get around.

reviews.title: Making our stay perfect.
reviews.text: The apartment is spacious, clean, and well-designed. The sea view from the balcony was a real highlight.

reviews.title: Very worth the money.
reviews.text: I have been to many units in the building. I find this unit to be the cleanest, with supportive staff who are easy to talk to. The price is a bit higher, but it is very clean (that’s important, everyone).

reviews.title: Great Stay
reviews.text: Host was very accomodating. Location is right next to the beach and there are a lot of great resturaunts nearby to eat at! Room was perfect. Thanks so much!

reviews.title: The staff is very dedicated and enthusiastic.
reviews.text: New room, clean and beautiful, with a nice sea view that meets the requirements. The apartment is located in the center, close to many famous places in Quy Nhon, with very convenient electric car transportation. The staff provides thorough and attentive consultation.

reviews.title: The vacation is too long.
reviews.text: Vacation in an apartment with a super chill ocean view. Just a few steps to the beach and local restaurants. The apartment is clean, modern, and fully equipped.

reviews.title: Beautiful sea view
reviews.text: The room is beautiful, and the sea view is absolutely wonderful. I really like the balcony of the room, with thin white curtains; in the afternoon, sunlight filters into the room, making it perfect for taking gorgeous pictures.
reviews.room_type: Seaview Three Bedroom Suite with Bathtub

reviews.title: Truly dedicated staff, a chill view, and you can walk to the beach.
reviews.text: The room is beautiful and more spacious than I thought, with decent decor and close to the beach, quite worth the money. Right in the center, the staff is enthusiastic from guiding the booking to the payment, and the view is nice too, definitely worth a try. The luxurious room had a plastic trash bin placed inside, which looked a bit less elegant, but I still found it amusing and was satisfied overall.

reviews.title: A quick booking but got an excellent room with super good staff.
reviews.text: At first, I booked this apartment in a hurry since the departure date was approaching. I didn't choose carefully, so I ended up booking a unit without a sea view, only a street view, which was a bit disappointing. On the bright side, the room is beautiful, the owner is considerate, and the staff is enthusiastic, so it eases the disappointment about the view.

reviews.title: Top-notch swimming pool, worth the money.
reviews.text: I really love the swimming pool of the building; it's spacious and comfortable for relaxation. The apartment I booked has a view that's not too special, but the room is beautiful, modern, and reasonably priced. The staff is very helpful, showing us a lot of good local restaurants with quality food.

reviews.title: Enthusiastic, outstanding.
reviews.text: This is my first time using the service here, and I find it acceptable. The room is clean and beautiful, the staff is polite, and the view is nice but a bit sunny.

reviews.title: Clean and beautiful view.
reviews.text: The apartment with a nice sea view is quite chill, fully equipped with amenities and extremely clean. The location of the apartment is very convenient for traveling to many famous tourist spots in the city, and catching rides is very easy.
reviews.room_type: Seaview Three Bedroom Suite with Bathtub

reviews.title: Fully equipped
reviews.text: The room looks exactly as advised, with simple and elegant decoration. The apartment is near the beach and the square, surrounded by many good restaurants. The staff is very polite.
reviews.room_type: Seaview Three Bedroom Suite with Bathtub

reviews.title: Very fond
reviews.text: This is the first place I booked in QN that I'm so satisfied with. The room is very beautifully decorated, the sea view is incredibly healing, and it's very close to the beach. The room is well-equipped with amenities, and there are many interesting and famous entertainment spots nearby that are within walking distance. The staff is really nice.

reviews.title: Spacious
reviews.text: Our group of 4 went, and we booked a room that was very spacious, the beds were wide, clean, and fragrant. The room had bright decor and a chill seaside view. It was very comfortable to stay.

reviews.title: Really like.
reviews.text: I went with my family, booked 3 rooms here, all the rooms are beautiful, the view is fine. Unfortunately, we didn't have much time to stay in QN, so we couldn't experience everything, but the first impression is already very good, and the staff is very responsible.

reviews.title: Clean
reviews.text: The room is clean, with a large bed, spacious, and has a beautiful view of the street and sparkling sea. The staff is also diligent and friendly. Overall, I highly appreciate it.

reviews.title: Come back a second time.
reviews.text: Last time I booked, it felt reasonable, so I'm booking again. I've seen a lot of improvement; the room is cleaner, the blankets smell great, and the staff are still cute and receptive to feedback like before.

reviews.title: Still new
reviews.text: The room is still new and very clean, the price is soft compared to the quality of the accommodation. As for the view, I booked a room next to the sea, the view is okay, but it's not that important because I will be out all day, just coming back to sleep at night, so a spacious view is sufficient.

reviews.title: You rated it well, huh?
reviews.text: I booked 2 units here with my friends, and it was really good. The room is clean, spacious, and fully equipped. It's less than a 5-minute walk to the beach from this unit, very satisfied.

reviews.title: Very much like.
reviews.text: I have been to Quy Nhon 3 times already, and each time I booked here, I was very satisfied. This time I went with 2 people, so I just booked a room with 1 bed, but it still feels very spacious and comfortable, the view is still beautiful, I still love it.

reviews.title: Very much like
reviews.text: It's my first time in QN and staying in this room makes me even more fond of this place. The room is beautifully decorated, spacious, and always clean. The apartment is high up, offering an excellent view of the sea and the city at night. I'm in love with it.

reviews.title: Near the sea
reviews.text: The room is beautiful and very close to the beach and the square. In the evening, it's just a few steps to the streets where there are many delicious and nice restaurants, very convenient. The staff is very enthusiastic in assisting with renting motorbikes or calling for electric cars, I will definitely support again.

reviews.title: Beautiful
reviews.text: Going to QN near Tet is very fun, the city is bustling with a strong Tet atmosphere, everywhere you go you see flowers, and the squares have lion dances and cultural performances all evening, it's extremely enjoyable. This year's mascot in QN is also beautifully outstanding. What I loved even more was booking this place very close to the beach and the square, making evening outings very convenient. Just a few steps from where I stayed is a whole street full of tea shops, coffee, dining, and drinking places... This trip was very enjoyable, looking forward to QN on a not-so-distant day!

reviews.title: Very well-equipped.
reviews.text: The room is clean, fully equipped with necessary items, the bathroom is very clean and beautiful, the living area has a sofa, and there's a TV. I found it very convenient to stay, there was nothing inconvenient.

reviews.title: Recommandé
reviews.text:
Apparemment très propre et très bien aménagé.
2 grands lits double 
Salle de bain avec grande baignoire
Canapé 
Balcon 
Machine à laver 
Appartement avec vue latérale à la mer .
Très calme (19eme pour notre appartement)
Rapport qualité prix exceptionnel 
Check in et out sans soucis 
Paiement en carte à la réception 

Nota : piscine de l immeuble hors service 
Manque micro onde et quelques ustensiles a l européenne (détail)

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: L'appartement est très bien, bon emplacement, propre , le seul problème c'est qu'il n'y avait personne pour réceptionner les nouveaux arrivants, j'ai attendu près de 3h pour que quelqu'un vienne me voir, et c'était un agent de sécurité. À mon avis , pour un si grand hôtel , il devrait y avoir une personne H24. Mais sinon tout était très bien.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Rapport qualité prix excellent 
Retourné 2 fois
Appartement avc cuisine et terrasse

reviews.title: tuyệt vời ông mặt trời
reviews.text: Phòng xịn nha, view xinh nha. Gần quảng trường với biển lắm nha. Chiều á hả, tui ra biển lượn vài vòng bằng cái xe đạp công cộng ngay gần tòa flc luôn, nghỉ dưỡng trọn vẹn lắm. Ngay bên dưới ks là cái quán bar dưới lòng đất, chơi đã lắm, ai ghé nhớ đi thử

reviews.text: Nhờ thằng bạn book giùm, thấy nó quảng cáo rầm rộ lắm, ở thấy cũng ổn không phải đẳng cấp nhưng cũng coi như đầu tư chỉn chu về mọi mặt

reviews.title: vị trí đẹp
reviews.text: Rất gần biển, gần quảng trường, chợ đêm đồ luôn, gần đó có con đường toàn là quán ngon, rất tiện

reviews.title: oke
reviews.text: Nói chung là được, ở được, không tệ

reviews.title: Được
reviews.text: Phòng ốc, view và vị trí khá ổn, không quá đặc biệt nhưng ở được

reviews.title: Xuất sắc
reviews.text: Thiệt không mong gì hơn được nữa luôn, nhân viên dễ thương, phòng ở sạch đẹp, giá mềm. Rất xuất sắc nghen

reviews.title: Hoàn mỹ
reviews.text: Đẹp và rất chuyên nghiệp. Căn hộ được dọn dẹp, sắp xếp rất chỉn chu. Cá nhân tôi rất hài lòng với vị trí căn này, đi ra vào thuận lợi, xung quanh nhiều quán nổi tiếng.

reviews.title: Phòng xịn
reviews.text: Phòng sang xịn mịn, trang trí đẹp lắm, giường rộng, chăn mền thơm và bồn tắm cũng sang chảnh.
reviews.response: FLC Sea Tower Seaview xin cảm ơn Quý Khách đã tin tưởng và ủng hộ dịch vụ bên em.

reviews.title: Đánh giá tốt
reviews.text: Phòng thơm và sạch, ban công không rộng lắm nhưng vẫn có bàn ghế ngồi ngắm biển. Từ phòng mình nhìn được quảng trường về đêm luôn. Giá cả không cao mà chất lượng phòng thì tốt. Hồ bơi bình thường như bao hồ bơi khác, chưa nổi trội
reviews.response: FLC Sea Tower Seaview xin cảm ơn Quý Khách đã tin tưởng và ủng hộ dịch vụ bên em.

reviews.title: tuyệt
reviews.text: Căn này bạn mình giới thiệu, khi book mình có yêu cầu lấy hai giường, mà bên này nhầm thành 1 giường. Mới đầu  mình rất khó chịu, nhưng thái độ phục vụ của các bạn nhân viên rất chuyên nghiệp nên cũng đã giải quyết nhanh cho mình. Mình thấy chất lượng tốt., phòng ốc sạch, thơm, view đẹp, phòng gần biển. Okela, hẹn sẽ quay lại
reviews.response: FLC Sea Tower Seaview xin cảm ơn Quý Khách đã tin tưởng và ủng hộ dịch vụ bên em.

reviews.title: Đầy đủ tiện nghi
reviews.text: Phòng đầy đủ công năng, tiện nghi, gần biển, có bồn tắm đẹp. Không có gì đáng chê, nhưng mà cá nhân mình thấy hồ bơi không đẹp lắm, nhưng view thì đỉnh thật nên bỏ qua được vấn đề đó
reviews.response: FLC Sea Tower Seaview xin cảm ơn Quý Khách đã tin tưởng và ủng hộ dịch vụ bên em.

reviews.response: FLC Sea Tower Seaview xin cảm ơn Quý Khách đã tin tưởng và ủng hộ dịch vụ bên em.

Không nói nhiều về chất lượng phòng, vì không có gì đáng chê nhưng nhất định phải khen nhân viên nha, cảm ơn các bạn rất nhiều vì đã giới thiệu cho mình nhiều quán ngon và chỗ thuê xe máy phải chăng

reviews.title: 干净整洁，海景很治愈。
reviews.text: 非常喜欢这里的住宿体验！每天早上面对大海醒来是一种享受，房间干净、装修时尚。

reviews.title: 宽敞又靠海，适合全家出游。
reviews.text: 强烈推荐！海景迷人，房间宽敞，离海滩非常近，适合情侣和家庭入住。

reviews.title: 清潔でおしゃれ、海の景色が最高。

reviews.title: 写真以上！夕日がとても美しい。
reviews.text: 海辺の隠れ家的な場所です。写真以上に素敵な部屋で、バルコニーから見る夕日はまさに絶景でした。

reviews.title: バルコニーからの日の出が最高。
reviews.text: 完璧なビーチフロントの宿でした。バルコニーからの日の出の眺めが本当に感動的。ぜひまた来たいです。

reviews.title: 舒适时尚，海景超美，房东很热情！

reviews.title: Idéal pour les familles, spacieux et sûr.
